title: チューリップ賞の後に・先制勝利！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vodka beats Daiwa Scarlet. They both feel each
other's growth, vowing to race against each other
again.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, in order to continue racing Daiwa
Scarlet in the Tiara tour, Vodka would have to
give up on the Classic Triple Crown tour.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If she follows through with Scarlet, it would be
near unprecedented to switch back to the Crown.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
To confront her rival or chase her dream... Not
wanting to give up on either, Vodka puts off her
decision and runs in the Oka Sho.
